G

generateButton - Variable in class controller.reportsViewController
 
getAllAppointmentData() - Static method in class helper.appointmentHelper
Retrieves data from the database and returns it into the table.
getAllContactData() - Static method in class helper.contactHelper
Retrieves contact from the database.
getAllCustomerData(customers) - Method in class controller.customerViewController
This will get all the data for the customer.
getAllData(appointment) - Method in class controller.appointmentViewController
This method grabs all the data from the database.

Retrieves data for the current week and inputs it into the table.
